title: lactaria elliptica
intro: Lactaria elliptica, also known as the elliptical milk cap, is a species of mushroom that belongs to the family Russulaceae and is characterized by its elliptical shape and white to pale yellow cap. The medicinal properties of Lactaria elliptica include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Lactaria elliptica are said to include reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Lactaria elliptica can be consumed as a tea, dried capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
